problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: The key to Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease? is Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins — specifically Autophagy activation to — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
